---
id: get-me
title: "Get orgs and roles for authenticated user"
description: "Get a list of all organizations that the user is a member and their roles in those organizations. Similar idea to /userinfo in OIDC."
sidebar_label: "Get orgs and roles for authenticated user"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: api//phase-two-admin-rest-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get orgs and roles for authenticated user"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/{realm}/orgs/me"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get a list of all organizations that the user is a member and their roles in those organizations. Similar idea to /userinfo in OIDC.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
